title: crataegus oxyacantha f. brevispina
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha f. brevispina, also known as the Dwarf Haw or Short-spined Hawthorn, is a variety of the Hawthorn tree (Crataegus oxyacantha), a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Crataegus oxyacantha f. brevispina lie in its ability to stimulate the cardiovascular system, improve circulation, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular natural remedy for heart health and high blood pressure. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, among others. Crataegus oxyacantha f. brevispina is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can also be consumed as a raw fruit or made into jams and preserves.
